title: Trump at Fort Bragg: Regime Change 'Best Thing'
detail: Speaking at Fort Bragg, NC, President Trump declares that regime change in Iran would be 'the best thing that could happen.' He announces a $1 trillion annual military investment and orders the USS Gerald R. Ford carrier strike group to the Middle East. The speech marks the sharpest escalation in presidential rhetoric yet, moving from threats of consequences to openly discussing regime change as a desirable outcome.

title: Oman-Mediated Talks Stall Over Core Issues
detail: Diplomatic sources report that the indirect US-Iran talks mediated by Oman's foreign minister have stalled over fundamental disagreements. Iran refuses to end all uranium enrichment or negotiate limits on ballistic missiles. The US demands full denuclearization and missile caps. Both sides agree to a second round of talks in Geneva scheduled for February 17, but prospects for a breakthrough are dim.
